scenarioName: Get app-state companion primary booking is deterministic (ACTIVE beats CONFIRMED)
objective: Validate GET /users/me/app-state selects primaryBooking deterministically for a companion: ACTIVE > CONFIRMED, with explicit ordering.

steps.query: INSERT INTO booking_companion_assignments (id, booking_id, companion_id, designation, presence_status, self_match_status, client_match_status) VALUES (md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text)::uuid, '{{TARGET_BOOKING_ID}}', '{{CAPTAIN_ID}}', 'CAPTAIN', 'ASSIGNED', 'NOT_MATCHED', 'WAITING_FOR_CLIENT'), (md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text || 'x')::uuid, '{{TARGET_BOOKING_ID}}', '{{VICE_CAPTAIN_ID}}', 'VICE_CAPTAIN', 'ASSIGNED', 'NOT_MATCHED', 'WAITING_FOR_CLIENT') ON CONFLICT (booking_id, designation) DO UPDATE SET companion_id = EXCLUDED.companion_id, presence_status = EXCLUDED.presence_status, self_match_status = EXCLUDED.self_match_status, client_match_status = EXCLUDED.client_match_status
steps.layman: Test-only: attach the seeded captain+vice to the second (ACTIVE) booking.
Captain requests app-state when assigned to both a CONFIRMED and an ACTIVE booking.
System selects the ACTIVE booking deterministically as the primary booking for the companion.
